title: Leatherpack
description: This pack revamps a few GUIs to make them resemble their respective blocks.
body:
![Survival Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6vr4Efsl/images/ccc7257b63a9757d80b42eb4da6fdfab62b715b8.png)

# About

This is a small and incomplete pack which replaces some block GUIs with themed ones, as well as leather wallet themed inventories. 

Progress on this pack is slow and inconsistent, as I'm usually busy playing on older versions of the game because of [Voxel Trains](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/voxel-trains-ir).

### Notes:

This pack was originally started by vectorwing back in 2020, all credit for the recipe book and the wooden portion of the crafting table goes to him.

The retextured items in some of the screenshots are from [Vectorwing's Detail Brush](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detail-brush/version/1.20-1.6).
